message:
fix(done): prevent zombie polecats with done-intent labels, deferred kill, and soft errors

Three coordinated improvements to `gt done` that prevent zombie polecats:

1. Done-intent label: Write `done-intent:<type>:<ts>` on agent bead early
   in gt done, before push/MR. Cleared on clean exit. Witness uses lingering
   labels to detect polecats that crashed mid-exit (dead session + old intent
   → auto-nuke, live session + old intent → kill stuck session).

2. Deferred session kill: Register defer at start of runDone that ensures
   selfKillSession fires on ANY exit path for polecats. Validation errors
   return before the flag is set (no-op). Operational errors (push/MR fail)
   return after (session killed by defer).

3. Non-fatal push/MR: Push and MR creation failures now goto notifyWitness
   instead of returning. Witness gets error details in notification body.
   Worktree nuke guarded with !pushFailed to preserve local branch for
   recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
